text_block_list.text:
I hear that there's a cold going<n>around. Then,
just as I start to think<n>my own throat's feeling a
little<n>irritated...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ACHOO!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, you got sick too?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... And I usually pride myself on<n>my good
health. I guess I caught this<n>from someone.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No two ways about it, you're gonna<n>need this.
It's my specially made<n>magical cough drop! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it's completely black. But it<n>does look
effective. Bottoms up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Blegh! What the heck is this?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It tastes like... medicine? A rubber<n>band? A tire?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's black licorice. Most people<n>here in
Japan hate how it tastes, but in<n>Europe it's
famous for treating<n>coughs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Gross or not, it really does work, you<n>know! So
give it a try.

A black cough drop that tastes like a<n>tire...
Doesn't sound too appealing,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you. You look like you're about<n>to sneeze.
Take a cough drop!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What are you getting so worked up<n>about? I'm
doing you a favor! Eat it<n>already!

With Sweep Tosho being so<n>considerate, I can't
refuse her. I make<n>up my mind and pop the black
drop<n>into my mouth.

Augh! It tastes like medicine but it has<n>the texture
of a tire!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Aha! ♪ I can tell from your face that<n>it's working
its magic!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay?! Take some deep<n>breaths! In! Out!
In! Out!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Sweep! You're still at it with your<n>infamous
magic cough drops?!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, is that trainer all right? That's<n>a face that
says "suffering" if I've<n>ever seen one!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, riiight? I'll go get you some<n>water. Oh and
watch out, chewing<n>makes it worse!

Students begin to gather around us,<n>perhaps
drawn by my look of<n>profound discomfort.

As I drink some water and slowly<n>regain my
composure...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Compared to when they were<n>complaining
about colds and stuff,<n>everyone looks a little
better now!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No wonder Granny always called it<n>magic candy.
♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That stuff I gave you! Granny's a<n>great witch,
and she told me that<n>candy always brings
laughter.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And that laughter made everyone feel<n>a little
better, right? That's what my<n>magic's all about!
♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you look like you want some<n>more. Okay,
here's another!
choice_data_list: Well, I guess I could try one more...

text_block_list.text:
Magic that brings laughter to<n>everyone around
you. Just as I start<n>to think that's actually quite a
nice<n>idea...
...The awful taste brings tears to my<n>eyes!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You should have stopped<n>when you had
the chance!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby B
text_block_list.text: Hey, just spit it out and drink some<n>water!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehe! A licorice a day keeps the<n>doctor away! ♪

But I find myself completely unable to<n>reach out
for it... Perhaps my whole<n>body has been
traumatized by the<n>taste!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Why's your hand shaking like that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. Okay, as an extra special<n>favor, I'll
leave you alone for today.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But that means the rest of you have<n>to eat
what's left.

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text: What? We do?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Duh! Now open up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, fine. Okay, here it comes...<n>BLEGH. It tastes
just like a rubber<n>band!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
No way! It tastes like a tire! A really<n>worn-out
one!

text_block_list.name: Student Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Come on, what does that<n>even mean?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aww, don't be like that.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Fine. Then, I'll just have to find<n>someone else
to—
Hehe, wait just a moment there,<n>Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've been developing a new<n>supplement, but the
taste has been<n>scaring off test subjects.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Which has me thinking now... If one<n>were to taste
something even worse<n>beforehand, that could
potentially<n>make the supplement taste good by<n>
comparison.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps even this Universal Amino<n>Capsule will
finally be rendered<n>edible?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon, you really have a screw<n>loose up there.
But then again...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That sounds super fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Then, let us begin, Sweep!<n>Commence pincer
attack!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: On it! Let's go!

In a merciless but splendidly<n>coordinated
operation, the two try to<n>catch me. I call for help
from Kitasan<n>Black and manage to escape the<n>
ordeal unscathed...
